title: hieracium sabaudum subsp. auratum
intro: Hieracium sabaudum subsp. auratum, also known as the aurulent Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium sabaudum plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium sabaudum subsp. auratum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and even alleviate symptoms of certain digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions to leverage its medicinal properties, but proper identification and dosage are essential due to its potential toxicity.
